       Computer Science > Cryptography and Security 
     

     
       arXiv:2407.03160  (cs)
     
 
   
     
  [Submitted on 3 Jul 2024] 
     Title: SOS! Soft Prompt Attack Against Open-Source Large Language Models 
     Authors: Ziqing Yang ,  Michael Backes ,  Yang Zhang ,  Ahmed Salem              View a PDF of the paper titled SOS! Soft Prompt Attack Against Open-Source Large Language Models, by Ziqing Yang and 3 other authors 
     View PDF 



     
             Abstract: Open-source large language models (LLMs) have become increasingly popular among both the general public and industry, as they can be customized, fine-tuned, and freely used. However, some open-source LLMs require approval before usage, which has led to third parties publishing their own easily accessible versions. Similarly, third parties have been publishing fine-tuned or quantized variants of thes
